summary: Implemented a comprehensive 'Game Polish' update for the fishing game. This includes a new high-impact Trophy Catch popup with celebratory animations, dynamic screen shake feedback for both regular and trophy catches, and integrated audio cues (celebratory oscillators) for success. The rendering loop in App.tsx was updated to support screen shake, and the SoundManager was expanded with new victory jingles. These enhancements significantly improve the gameplay feel and rewarding nature of the fish collection mechanics.

risks.description: The rapid screen shake and flickering animations might be sensitive for users with photosensitivity.
risks.mitigation: The shake effect decays very rapidly (0.9 multiplier per frame) and is limited to catch events only.

manual_validation.check: Catch a fish and verify that the screen shakes and a victory sound plays.
manual_validation.notes: Verified logic in code and local dev server triggers.

manual_validation.check: Catch a trophy fish (large variant) and verify the 'TROPHY CAUGHT' popup appears with the bounce animation and unique sound.
manual_validation.notes: Trophy catch state triggers correctly in the onFishCaught event handler.
